summary: Iteration 13 testing complete - Smart LLM infrastructure with dual model system, response cache, background tasks, and Docker deployment files. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified including dual model settings fields and 'Sistema de Modelo Dual' info box.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/system/memory-stats returns cache_entries, conversation_summaries, tasks_pending, tasks_completed
PUT /api/settings accepts ollama_model_fast and ollama_model_smart fields and persists them
GET /api/settings returns ollama_model_fast and ollama_model_smart fields
GET /api/system/task/{id} returns task status (not_found for invalid IDs)
smart_llm.py module has detect_complexity, get_model_for_task, cache functions, memory context builder, background_worker
Complexity detection uses COMPLEX_KEYWORDS (mentoria, relatorio, analise completa, etc.) and SIMPLE_PATTERNS (oi, sim, nao, etc.)
SettingsPanel.js shows dual model inputs: 'Modelo Rapido (chat)' and 'Modelo Inteligente (complexo)'
SettingsPanel.js shows 'Sistema de Modelo Dual' info box explaining the auto-detection
Sidebar correctly shows 'Mordomo Virtual' as the agent name
Docker files exist: docker-compose.yml, deploy.sh, backend/Dockerfile, frontend/Dockerfile
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing admin account for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 added smart LLM infrastructure. Key endpoints: GET /api/system/memory-stats (cache_entries, summaries, tasks), GET/PUT /api/settings (ollama_model_fast, ollama_model_smart), GET /api/system/task/{id}. Backend module: smart_llm.py with detect_complexity(), get_model_for_task(), cache functions, build_memory_context(), maybe_create_summary(), background_worker(). Frontend: SettingsPanel.js has dual model inputs and 'Sistema de Modelo Dual' info box. Docker files: docker-compose.yml, deploy.sh, backend/Dockerfile, frontend/Dockerfile.

backend_api.GET /api/system/memory-stats: PASS - Returns cache_entries, conversation_summaries, tasks_pending, tasks_completed
backend_api.GET /api/settings: PASS - Returns settings including ollama_model_fast and ollama_model_smart
backend_api.PUT /api/settings (both models): PASS - Saves both models and verifies persistence
backend_api.GET /api/system/task/{id}: PASS - Returns not_found for invalid task ID

docker_files.docker-compose.yml: PASS - Exists with mongodb, backend, frontend services

notes.dual_model_system: Fast model (7B) for simple chat, Smart model (32B) for complex tasks like mentoria, relatorio, analise
notes.complexity_detection: Uses keyword matching (COMPLEX_KEYWORDS) and regex patterns (SIMPLE_PATTERNS) to auto-select model
notes.response_cache: SHA256 hash of message, TTL 1h for fast, 24h for smart responses
notes.memory_system: Summaries every 5 messages, old topic search when user references past (lembra, falamos, antes)
notes.background_worker: Asyncio task for heavy operations like mentorship generation
notes.docker_deployment: docker-compose.yml with mongodb, ollama, backend, frontend services
